task: #19 P9.A3 retained GDN prefill benchmark after P9.A1 chain + P9.A2 fixture
summary: qwen35moe GGUF GDN prefill is now on the k2/segments_k2 + fused RMSNorm-gate chain introduced by P9.A1. The GDN bucket at 512/0 drops from 666.9 ms / 30 dispatches (P8 fused _decode_order_kernel) to 56.27 ms / 90 dispatches across the prepare + k2_segments + rmsnorm_gate chain (~11.85x reduction). Total prefill kernel time drops from 907.8 ms to 296.76 ms (~3.06x). Wall-clock prefill on Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M 512/0 improves from 534.4 tok/s to 1508.7 tok/s median over 3 cached runs (~+182%); 512/128 graph stays at 1505.97 tok/s prefill and 62.69 tok/s decode (decode path unchanged, expected). E2E parity on the GDN-isolated path (native_attention_bulk_ffn) is bit-exact (KL=0.0, top-1 match token 4469) vs the row-GEMV serial reference. The cumulative compact-MoE WMMA path remains at KL=0.707 (carryover P8 drift, owned by tasks #28/#30).

hardware.gpu: AMD Radeon RX 7900 XTX / gfx1100 (local; W7900 not re-run for this artifact)

software.hipcc_version:
HIP version: 7.13.60940-478a7a43c6
AMD clang version 23.0.0git (https://github.com/ROCm/llvm-project.git a3c1e65bfd98c7a76cafd24c34baf11f93e06be4+PATCHED:2506c552d8428e2cc1778bef048b20f818e06bb3)
Target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
Thread model: posix
InstalledDir: /home/lhl/miniforge3/envs/therock/lib/python3.12/site-packages/_rocm_sdk_devel/lib/llvm/bin

commands.correctness_kernel_bundle: cd /home/lhl/hipENGINE && uv run --with pytest pytest tests/test_qwen35_gguf_gdn_prefill_correctness.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_gdn_prefill_routing.py tests/test_qwen35_linear_attn_gdn_plan.py -q
commands.bench_512_0: cd /home/lhl/hipENGINE && HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_m --prompt-length 512 --decode-tokens 0 --warmup-decode-tokens 0 --warmup-runs 0 --measured-runs 3 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --graph-steps-per-replay 1 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/p9_a3/wmma-512-0.json
commands.bench_512_128_graph: cd /home/lhl/hipENGINE && HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_m --prompt-length 512 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 1 --warmup-runs 0 --measured-runs 3 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --graph-replay-decode --graph-steps-per-replay 1 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/p9_a3/wmma-512-128.json
commands.rocprof_512_0: cd /home/lhl/hipENGINE && HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv --output-directory /tmp/p9_a3/rocprof-512-0 -- python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py [...] --decode-tokens 0 --measured-runs 1 ...
commands.rocprof_512_128_eager: cd /home/lhl/hipENGINE && HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv --output-directory /tmp/p9_a3/rocprof-512-128-eager -- python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py [...] --decode-tokens 128 --no-graph-replay-decode --measured-runs 1 ...

kernel_bundle.method: P9.A2 CPU-reference fixture compares prepare + k2 + rmsnorm_gate vs prepare + segments_k2 + rmsnorm_gate vs fused decode_order_bf16 across small + Qwen3.6 shape + segment-boundary cases. P9.A1 routing tests confirm registry-only dispatch; legacy fused fallback still resolves when chain is incomplete.

e2e_parity_native_bulk_ffn.note: Native attention + bulk FFN/MoE isolates the GDN chain (compact-MoE WMMA off). Bit-exact with the row-GEMV serial reference => the GDN k2/segments_k2 chain itself does not introduce drift.

e2e_parity_fast_bulk_attention_carryover.note: Cumulative compact-MoE WMMA path; KL=0.707 carryover from task #16 (was 3.892 then, dropped to 0.707 after P9.A1). Owned by tasks #28 small-op fusion gated by KL and #30 formal E2E KL fixture; NOT the GDN chain.

notes: stripped 1558 leading dispatch(es) from the decode CSV as the prefill prefix.

vs_task16_p8_acceptance_512_128_graph.note: Decode unchanged as expected; P9.A1 only touched prefill GDN. Decode rewire is task #26 P9.B7.

rocprof.method: Clean 512/0 prefill-only kernel trace is the canonical bucket source. 512/128 graph-replay profiler attempts time out (same pathology as task #16); a 512/128 eager-decode trace is retained for symbol visibility only.
gdn_chain_kernel_names: (anonymous namespace)::qwen35_gdn_prefill_recurrent_k2_segments_kernel(float const*, float const*, float const*, float const*, float const*, float*, float*, int const*, long const*, long, long, long, long)

remaining_legacy_pack8_prefill_out_in_pr: void (anonymous namespace)::gguf_k_pack8_prefill_out_kernel<unsigned short, float, 6>(unsigned short const*, unsigned char const*, float*, int, int, int, int)

decision.reason: GDN prefill bucket meets the <=200 ms acceptance target with a ~11.85x reduction. rocprof confirms only k2_segments + prefill_rmsnorm_gate_bf16 + linear_attn_prefill_prepare symbols are present on the qwen35moe linear-attention prefill path; the legacy fused decode_order_bf16 kernel is fully gone. Kernel-level correctness gate (P9.A2) and E2E parity on the GDN-isolated bulk path pass; cumulative WMMA drift is documented as a pre-existing P8 carryover owned by tasks #28/#30.

notes: Hardware available locally is RX 7900 XTX / gfx1100. PARO comparison rows in benchmarks/README.md are on the matched W7900.

Task #25 P9.B6 dispatch wiring is in tree but default-off (use_gemv_decode=False). Decode wall-clock and rocprof bucket totals reflect the legacy *_prefill_out_* family; task #26 P9.B7 measures the opt-in route.
The decode-CSV summary uses --strip-prefill-prefix so the decode phase bucket totals exclude the 1558-dispatch prefill prefix.
